expectedVsObserved.expected: Validate Jungle Approval Queue flow and core interactions for objective: Verify the Electron application's main window is accessible and inspectable.

issues.description: One or more semantic checks failed.
issues.fix: Inspect semantic_report and harden assertions around expected motion/state changes.

issues.evidence: A wait step is missing from executed sequence.
issues.fix: Include a wait step (>= 10 seconds) before post-observation assertions.
